sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_list (id INTEGER, list_items LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, array_intersect(list_items, [3, 6]) AS intersected_items FROM test_list;
UPDATE test_list SET list_items = array_intersect(list_items, [1, 2, 3]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_intersect([4, 5, 6], list_items) AS intersected_items FROM test_list WHERE id = 2;
